meaning: n.灰色,暗淡,灰暗adj.灰色的,灰白的,老的,老练的,阴沉的,<美俚>广告商的,广告业的 v.(使)变灰色
examples: Mary cried, "the gray wall is changing."
Mold is usually green, white, black or gray.
Mr Henry's outburst came as MSPs were grilling Sir John and human resources officer Paul Gray.
Coming up are a seniors show called Gray Matter and a program for kids.
